## Is this a Cadence issue or a platform issue?
<!-- Cadence is a plugin. Some reported "bugs" are actually issues
     in the underlying platform or model. If you're not sure, try
     reproducing without Cadence installed.

     If the problem persists without Cadence, file the issue with
     your platform instead. -->

- [ ] I confirmed this issue does not occur without Cadence installed
